home.heroTitleVariantB: Something <accent>new</accent> with what's on your counter
home.heroTagline: Delicious food, drink and cocktail recipes. Decide what to cook faster, with recipes that actually work.
home.heroSecondaryTitle: Find <accent>what to cook</accent> with what you have
home.heroSecondaryTagline: List your pantry; get a recipe suggestion in 30 seconds, matched to your time and sensitivities.
home.heroPantryCta: Suggest recipes from my {count} pantry items
home.sectionPersonalizedSubtitle: Built from your chosen cuisines, tags, and allergen avoidances.
home.sectionFeaturedSubtitle: Handpicked by the Tarifle editors with balance across categories.
home.aiBannerTitle: List what's in your pantry, get a recipe
home.aiBannerDescription: Tell us what you have, we'll show the best-matching recipes and what's missing.
home.ctaDescription: Sign up, add your take on favourite recipes, and share with the community.

suggestedCooks.heading: 👨‍🍳 Suggested Cooks
suggestedCooks.subtitle: Cooks who shared adaptations in the last 30 days and are followed by the community.

expiringSoon.headline: {count} pantry items expire soon
expiringSoon.subtitle: {names} approaching their expiry date. Try the recipes below.

subtitle.breakfastQuick: Under 20 min breakfast ideas to kick off the day.
subtitle.lunchMedium: Under 45 min soups and warm mains.
subtitle.afternoonSnack: Light snacks that pair with tea time.
subtitle.dinnerWeekendLong: You have more time, try the classics.
subtitle.lateNightSweet: Small sweets, under 15 min, before bed.

login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Sign in to Tarifle and join the community.
login.passwordResetOk: Your password has been updated. You can sign in with the new password.

errors.oauthNotLinked: This email is already registered with a password. For now, please sign in with your password; Google account linking will be added to settings soon.
errors.configuration: Server configuration error. Please try again later.
errors.default: Something went wrong while signing in. Please try again.

register.title: Sign Up
register.subtitle: Create a free account and contribute recipes.
register.benefitsTitle: What you can do as a member
register.benefit1: Save recipes to collections, build a shopping list
register.benefit2: Like, comment, and leave star ratings
register.benefit3: Share your own adaptations and earn badges
register.consent: I have read and accept the <kvkk>KVKK Privacy Notice</kvkk> and <terms>Terms of Use</terms>.

errors.signInAfter: Account created but sign-in failed. Please sign in from the login page.

forgotPassword.pageSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a single-use reset link.
forgotPassword.emailHelper: We'll send a reset link to the email registered on your account.
forgotPassword.sentBody: We sent an email to <email>{email}</email>. The link is valid for 1 hour. If you don't see it, check your spam or junk folder.
forgotPassword.sentHint: Still no email? The address may not be registered here, or your account may be linked to Google, try "Sign in with Google" from the login page.

resetPassword.subtitleValid: Your link is active. Set your new password below.
resetPassword.subtitleInvalid: This link is no longer valid, you can request a new one below.
resetPassword.invalidExpired: Your reset link has expired. Request a new one and use it within 1 hour.
resetPassword.invalidOther: This link is invalid. It may have been used already or copied incorrectly.
resetPassword.doneBody: You can now sign in with your new password. Redirecting to the sign-in page…

verifyEmail.successBody: <email>{email}</email> is now linked to your account. The "Verified user" badge will show on your profile.
verifyEmail.failExpired: This verification link has expired. Request a new one from your profile.
verifyEmail.failOther: This verification link is invalid. It may have been used already or copied incorrectly.

intros: You might want to try this today
This is on our mind today
Shall we try this in the kitchen today?

tatli: Kills a sweet craving, and does the job when guests drop by.
Nobody can resist the smell of a homemade dessert.
kokteyl: When the weekend rolls in, get the glasses ready.
Too much effort for a quiet night, just right for a real celebration.
corba: A warming start, medicine on a cold day.
One spoonful takes the edge off the day.
salata: A fresh touch for the table, light and still satisfying.
Not a side dish, the kind of salad that earns main-character energy.
kahvalti: Made for a leisurely Sunday breakfast.
Lifts the morning mood in just a few minutes.
atistirmalik: Small but effective, movie night or a surprise guest.
hard: Takes patience, but the result is genuinely impressive.
Treat it as a weekend project, the table will reward you.
quick: Practical and easy, a friend on tired days.
A filling option that doesn't even take half an hour.
veryQuick: On the table in 20 minutes, fast, not careless.
The first thing that comes to mind when you want something quick.
light: For those keeping it light, without cutting back on flavour.
hearty: Filling and nourishing, it won't leave you hungry.
A well-earned dinner at the end of a long day.
popularVariations: A recipe the community has tried and made their own.
See how many variations it has, check the adaptations tab.
featured: An editor's favourite, simple but memorable.

empty: {ctx}I couldn't find a recipe you can make with {count} ingredient(s). Want to add a couple more, or shall we loosen the filters?
{ctx}No match for this combination. Add more ingredients or relax the filters.
{ctx}Nothing matched what you have. Try more staple ingredients (eggs, onion, tomato, etc.).
perfectMany: {ctx}You can make {count} recipes exactly with what you have. I put the fastest ones on top.
{ctx}Nice pantry: you don't even need to shop for {count} recipes.
{ctx}Luckily you have {count} options, all fully covered.
perfect2: {ctx}Two recipes need nothing extra: {title1} and {title2}. Which one fits your mood?
With what you have, you can make {title1} or {title2}. Both have zero missing.
Perfect fit on 2 recipes: {title1} and {title2}. The rest need a bit of shopping.
perfect1: {ctx}You don't need to buy anything for {title}, perfect fit. A few close alternatives sit below.
Head to the kitchen: {title} is ready with what you have. Others need a couple of items.
Only one exact match: {title}. If you want alternatives, the ones below need just 1–2 extras.
closeCall: {ctx}No perfect match, but {title} only needs {missing}, quick market run.
Closest option is {title}. Grab {missing} and you're set.
{title} is missing {missing}. Everything else is already in your kitchen.
fallback: {ctx}No exact match, but {title} uses the most of your ingredients. Missing items listed below.
Best candidate: {title}. I listed the missing items below.
{title} is a good starting point. Check the card for what's missing.
notesFirstPerfect: Best match. You can use all of your ingredients.
Top pick, perfect fit and the strongest result.
notesFirstOneMissing: One ingredient missing ({missing}), the rest is ready.
notesFastest: Fastest option, on the table in {minutes} minutes.
The quickest one. Perfect for a hungry surprise guest.
notesPerfectAlt: Nothing missing, you could pick this one too.
Everything is there, keep it as plan B.
Another exact match. File it as a backup.
notesHard: Takes patience, but the result is impressive.
A bit ambitious, try it when you have time.
Needs some skill, but whoever sits at the table will notice.
aiCommentary.notesLongest: Slow cooker, you can leave it on the stove.
pantryOnly: {ctx}You've only listed pantry staples (salt, pepper, oil). Add a vegetable, protein, or grain and I'll surface real matches.
{ctx}These are all pantry items, add one real ingredient (say, tomato, chicken, or lentils) and the suggestions will click into place.
{ctx}Pantry-only input won't get us far. Throw in one non-staple ingredient and try again.
manyIngredients: {ctx}You've loaded up the pantry, {count} recipes match. {title} is at the top.
{ctx}That's a generous pantry. {count} recipes fit, starting with {title}.
{ctx}With this much to work with, {count} recipes turn up, {title} leads the pack.
singleIngredient: {ctx}Starting with just {ingredient}? {title} is the closest match.
{ctx}One ingredient to work with, {title} is your best bet.

site.description: A modern recipe platform serving clean, community-contributed food, drink and cocktail recipes.

aiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
aiAssistant.description: List the ingredients you have and we'll surface the best-matching recipes. You'll also see what's missing.

shoppingList.title: My Shopping List
shoppingList.description: Bookmarked recipe ingredients and items you add manually, all in one list.

pantry.title: My Pantry
pantry.description: Keep a persistent list of ingredients at home, track expiry dates, and let the AI Assistant pull from this list with one click.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Track adaptation likes, moderation decisions and badge notifications here.

login.title: Sign In
login.description: Sign in to your Tarifle account.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: Random recipes, popular searches and cuisine discoveries.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.description: The most active members of the Tarifle community. Weekly, monthly and all-time rankings.

categoriesPage.title: Categories
categoriesPage.description: Browse every recipe category: soups, main dishes, desserts, drinks and more.

mealPlanner.title: Meal Planner
mealPlanner.description: Plan this week's 7-day × 3-meal menu and generate the shopping list in one click.

blog.title: Blog
blog.description: Kitchen guides, cooking techniques and ingredient deep-dives from Tarifle.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Reset your Tarifle account password by email.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Reach the Tarifle team, feedback, bug reports, partnership, or KVKK data requests.

legal.privacyDescription: Information on how Tarifle processes personal data.
legal.kvkkDescription: KVKK (Turkish Data Protection Law) privacy notice.
legal.hubDescription: Privacy, security, KVKK, cookies and terms, all in one hub.
legal.cookiesDescription: How Tarifle uses cookies, for what purpose, and how you can control them.
legal.securityDescription: What you can do to protect your account and the measures we take on our side.
legal.contactNoticeDescription: Specific notice on how your data is processed when you reach us by email.

verification.subject: Verify your Tarifle account
verification.title: Verify your account
verification.body: Click the button below to verify your Tarifle account. This link is valid for {hours} hours.
verification.fallbackHint: If the button doesn't work, paste this link into your browser:
verification.footer: If you didn't request this email, ignore it, no one can access your account.
verification.textBody: Click the link below to verify your Tarifle account:
verification.textExpiry: This link is valid for {hours} hours.
verification.textFooter: If you didn't request this email, ignore it, no one can access your account.

passwordReset.subject: Tarifle password reset
passwordReset.title: Reset your password
passwordReset.body: Click the button below to reset your Tarifle account password. This link is valid for {hours} hour(s).
passwordReset.fallbackHint: If the button doesn't work, paste this link into your browser:
passwordReset.footer: If you didn't request this email, ignore it, your password stays the same. If something looks suspicious, check your account at tarifle.app/ayarlar.
passwordReset.textBody: Click the link below to reset your Tarifle account password:
passwordReset.textExpiry: This link is valid for {hours} hour(s).
passwordReset.textFooter: If you didn't request this email, ignore it, your password stays the same.

oauthOnlyReset.subject: Tarifle, this account is linked to Google
oauthOnlyReset.title: This account is linked to Google
oauthOnlyReset.body: We received a password reset request for {email} on Tarifle. This account is linked to Google and has no password sign-in.
oauthOnlyReset.hint: If you'd like to add password sign-in too, go to Settings after signing in and use the "Add password" option.
oauthOnlyReset.footer: If you didn't request this email, ignore it, your account stays the same.
oauthOnlyReset.textBody: We received a password reset request for {email} on Tarifle.
oauthOnlyReset.textBody2: This account is linked to Google and has no password sign-in.
oauthOnlyReset.textBody3: To sign in, use the Sign in with Google button:
oauthOnlyReset.textHint1: If you want to add password sign-in too, after signing in with Google
oauthOnlyReset.textHint2: go to the settings page and use the 'Add password' flow.
oauthOnlyReset.textFooter: If you didn't request this email, ignore it, your account stays the same.

newsletterWeekly.subject: {siteName}: This week's editor picks
newsletterWeekly.title: What should we cook this week?
newsletterWeekly.intro: This week's editor picks, newly added recipes, and trending cuisines, at a glance.
newsletterWeekly.outro: Try one of these, when you do, you can share your adaptation on the recipe page.
newsletterWeekly.footer: You're receiving this because you subscribed to Tarifle's weekly editor picks.

features.heading: ⚙️ Feature Settings
features.subtitle: Site-wide runtime feature flags. Changes propagate within 60s cache window.

leaderboard.heading: 🏆 Leaderboard
leaderboard.helper: When off, /leaderboard returns 404 and the Navbar link is hidden. The score cron keeps running in the background so data is ready when re-enabled.

userPhotos.heading: 📸 User Photos
userPhotos.subtitle: Moderate photos users upload to recipes. When the feature flag is off, the upload form and grid are hidden, existing photos are preserved.
userPhotos.toggleHelper: When off, the recipe pages don't render the upload form or grid. Existing photos are kept and reappear when the flag is flipped back on.
userPhotos.deleteConfirm: Delete this photo? This cannot be undone.

bulkModeration.selectedEmpty: Nothing selected, tick rows to begin
bulkModeration.error_too-many: Only 50 at a time. Reduce the selection.

analytics.heading: 📊 Analytics Dashboard
analytics.subtitle: Community health metrics, last 7 days growth, subscriber/review pace, popular content.
analytics.viewTrendEmpty: No views logged in the last 30 days.
analytics.searchFreqComingSoon: Search query logging is not active yet, infrastructure coming soon.
analytics.searchFreqEmpty: No search logs in the last 7 days.

broadcast.pageDescription: This form creates an in-app notification per user for the target audience. No email is sent. Suspended and deleted accounts are excluded.
broadcast.tip1: Keep the title short and actionable ("New: 1100 recipes live").
broadcast.tip2: Use an internal link (e.g. "/kesfet"). A click marks the notification as read.
broadcast.tip3: Every broadcast is written to ModerationAction; who sent what and when stays in the log.
broadcast.confirmPrompt: This notification will go {target}{verified}. Are you sure?

actions.promptHideReason: Optional: note the hide reason (shown to the author).
actions.promptHideCollectionReason: Optional: hide reason (shown to the owner in the moderation log).
actions.promptSuspendReason: Optional: suspension reason (written to the moderation log).
actions.promptUnsuspendConfirm: Unsuspend this user so they can sign in again?

reviews.heading: Review queue
reviews.subtitle: Adaptations and reviews flagged by rule-based preflight, waiting for human eyes. Approve to publish, hide to archive.
reviews.emptyVariations: Review queue is currently empty. New flagged adaptations will show up here.
reviews.emptyReviews: No reviews to review. Preflight (caps / URL / spam repetition) flags will appear here.

reviewsBrowse.heading: Comments
reviewsBrowse.subtitle: User comments on recipes, newest first. Not a moderation queue, browse + audit only.
reviewsBrowse.allWarning: Loading all comments, may be a large list.

categories.rowDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete category "{name}"?
categories.rowDeleteDisabled: Move recipes to another category before deleting.

tags.rowDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete tag "{name}"?
tags.rowDeleteDisabled: Remove this tag from recipes before deleting.

announcements.endsAtHelp: Leave empty to keep it live indefinitely.

moderationLog.empty: No log entries match these filters.

inlineEdit.statusHideConfirm: HIDING this recipe removes it from users. Continue?
inlineEdit.selfDemoteConfirm: You're changing your own role. You may lose admin access. Are you sure?

contentEdit.helpText: Edit ingredients, steps, and notes here. Cache is cleared automatically on save.
contentEdit.tipNotePlaceholder: Share a small trick (e.g. resting the dough 30 min improves elasticity)
contentEdit.servingSuggestionPlaceholder: What pairs well? (e.g. serve with ayran and tzatziki)
contentEdit.dragHint: Reorder by dragging a row from the handle on its left.
contentEdit.dragHandleIngredient: Ingredient {n} drag handle, drag to reorder
contentEdit.dragHandleStep: Step {n} drag handle, drag to reorder
contentEdit.confirmRemoveIngredientBody: “{label}” will be removed from the list. Applied only to the draft until you save.
contentEdit.confirmRemoveStepBody: Step {n} will be removed from the list. Applied only to the draft until you save.

preview.heading: Live Preview
preview.hint: Updates instantly as the form changes. Draft only, nothing goes live until you save.
preview.empty: Start filling the form to see the preview here.

contentEdit.errorNoIngredient: At least one ingredient is required.
contentEdit.errorNoStep: At least one step is required.
contentEdit.errorEmDash: Em-dash (U+2014) or en-dash (U+2013) are not allowed. Use comma, period, parentheses.

dashboard.growthAria: Last 30 days of daily new users, total {total}
dashboard.batchesEmpty: No batches yet (shows once 5+ recipes INSERT in the same hour).
dashboard.batchesFooter: Hourly buckets, appears when 5+ recipes INSERT in the same hour.

iletisim.title: Get in touch
iletisim.subtitle: Fastest way to reach the Tarifle team.
iletisim.emailHelp: General feedback, bug reports, and partnership inquiries.
iletisim.kvkkHelp: Access, correction, or deletion of your personal data. We respond within 30 days under Turkish Data Protection Law.
iletisim.moderationHelp: Report a recipe, variation, or review directly from the content page, the report button sends it straight to our moderation queue.
iletisim.responseNote: We're a small team, expect a reply within a few business days.
iletisim.privacyNoticeBody: When you email us, we process your data only to respond. For details see

allergen.titleShow: Click to stop hiding recipes with {label}

settings.pageSubtitle: Update your name, username, and bio here. Your username appears in your profile URL.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the interface language. Changes apply instantly; recipe content will also appear in your selected language (where an English translation exists).

preferences.title: Personalisation preferences
preferences.description: Tell us what you like, discovery and recommendations will adapt to your picks. Each section is multi-select; tap again to remove.
preferences.tagsHelp: Pick the themes you'd like to see more of (quick, vegetarian, high-protein…).
preferences.allergensHelp: Recipes containing these will be pushed down in listings. Not medical advice, always double-check ingredient labels.
preferences.cuisinesHelp: Pick the cuisines you'd like to see more of. With no picks, all cuisines get equal weight.

privacy.heading: Profile privacy
privacy.subtitle: You choose what others see on your profile. If you turn something off it stays visible to you but is hidden from visitors.
privacy.chefScoreDescription: Profile chip and leaderboard listing. If off you also drop out of the leaderboard.
privacy.activityDescription: Your latest variations, reviews and collections appear as a timeline on your profile.
privacy.followCountsDescription: Follower/following counts and lists are visible to visitors. If off only you see them.

pantry.heading: Pantry and cooking preferences
pantry.subtitle: We keep your pantry as simple as possible. Turn on advanced features like expiry tracking or pick a cooking-mode voice here.
pantry.expiryTrackingDescription: When on, the /dolap page shows a date field for each ingredient and a banner highlights items about to expire. When off you only manage amount and unit.
pantry.ttsVoiceDescription: Gender of the Turkish voice used when the cooking mode reads steps aloud. If your platform lacks that gender a Turkish voice, the available one is used.

profile.emailHelper: You can't change your email here.
profile.usernameHelper: Lowercase letters, digits, _ and - only. Must start with a letter.
profile.usernameChangeWarning: If you change it, your profile link becomes brand new.
profile.bioPlaceholder: Tell us a little about yourself, favourite recipes, cooking style, etc.

google.title: Google account
google.descriptionLinked: Your account is linked to this Google identity: {email}. Next time you sign in, choose "Sign in with Google" and you won't need a password.
google.descriptionUnlinked: Link your Google account so you can sign in with one click. Only a Google account that matches your sign-up email can be linked.
google.confirmUnlink: Are you sure you want to unlink your Google account? After this you'll only be able to sign in with email + password.
google.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.
google.startError: Couldn't start the linking flow. Please try again.
google.linkSuccessBanner: Your Google account has been linked successfully.
google.mismatchBanner: The Google account you chose isn't registered as <email>{email}</email>. To link your account you need to choose the Google identity with the same email.
google.sessionBanner: The linking request expired. Please try again.
google.unlinkSuccessBanner: Your Google account has been unlinked.
google.needPasswordHint: To unlink your Google account you first need to add a password, you can add one from the Password card below.

password.title: Password
password.descriptionChange: For your security, change your password from time to time.
password.descriptionSet: Your account was created via Google. Add a password so you can also sign in with email + password.
password.newPasswordHelper: At least 8 characters. Pick something not easy to guess.

delete.title: Danger zone
delete.description: You can permanently delete your account. This action can't be undone. Your adaptations, collections, likes and notifications will be removed.
delete.confirmDialog: Your account will be permanently deleted. All your adaptations, collections, likes and notifications will be removed. This action can't be undone, do you want to continue?
delete.confirmHelper: To continue, type your username exactly:
delete.passwordHelper: For security, we need to verify your current password.

footer.brandTagline: A modern recipe platform serving clean food, drink, and cocktail recipes with community contributions.

profile.collectionsEmptyOwner: You haven't created any collections yet. Open a recipe and start with the 'Collection' button.
profile.reviewsEmptyOwner: You haven't reviewed any recipe yet.
profile.bookmarksEmpty: You haven't saved any recipes yet.

collection.empty: This collection has no recipes yet.

notifications.emptyAll: You have no notifications yet. New activity will appear here.

feed.pageDescription: Recent adaptations from people you follow.
feed.heading: From people you follow
feed.subtitle: Adaptations shared in the last 30 days by cooks you follow, newest first.
feed.emptyBody: Either you aren't following anyone or they haven't shared in 30 days. Browse recipes and follow the cooks whose adaptations you like.

landing.tagMetaDescription: {count} recipes tagged "{label}". Easy filters, detailed ingredient list and allergen info.
landing.emptyBody: No recipes added for this filter yet. More coming soon.

leaderboard.pageSubtitle: The most active members of the Tarifle community. Weekly, monthly and all-time rankings based on variations, likes, photos and editor picks.
leaderboard.emptyBody: No active users in this period. Share a variation to make the list.
leaderboard.scoreFormula: Chef Score: <bold>variations × 3 + likes × 1 + reviews × 2 + photos × 2 + editor picks × 10</bold>. Only moderator-approved content counts.

demo.bannerSubtitle: A sample week below: breakfast, lunch and dinner for each day. Sign up to fill your own menu in one click and turn it into a shopping list.
demo.footerHint: This is a sample menu. Log in to build your own plan and turn it into a shopping list.

mealPlanner.subtitle: Pick a recipe for each of the 7 days × 3 meals this week. Push your selections into the shopping list in one click.
mealPlanner.emptyHint: You haven't picked any recipes yet. Click a cell to start.

picker.empty: No recipes found for this search.
picker.hint: Type at least 2 characters to start searching.
picker.saveError: Something went wrong while saving the recipe.

shoppingList.successAdded: Added {addedCount} new items from {recipeCount} recipes, {mergedCount} merged with existing.

aiFill.ingredientsHelp: Separate with commas or new lines. 1 to 30 ingredients.

aiFill.requireFullyStockedHint: Skips any recipe where your pantry quantities fall short. Turn on when you want to cook without extra shopping.
aiFill.cuisinesHintAll: All cuisines included. Pick the ones you want to limit to.
aiFill.cuisinesHintSelected: {count} cuisines selected, only those will appear.
aiFill.regenerateAria: Generate a new menu with the same preferences
aiFill.shoppingHint: Add all recipe ingredients to your shopping list in one click.
aiFill.shoppingAria: Add menu recipe ingredients to the shopping list
aiFill.shoppingSuccess: Added {addedCount} new items from {recipeCount} recipes, {mergedCount} merged.
aiFill.errorShopping: Couldn't add to the shopping list.
aiFill.macroHint: Nutrient to prioritize. 'None' keeps the default ordering.
aiFill.favoriteApplyAria: Load the {name} template into the form
aiFill.favoriteSaveAria: Save this menu setup as a favorite template
aiFill.regenerateSlotAria: Swap this meal for a different recipe

loadPantry.loginHint: Sign in to use your pantry.

recipeVariants.heading: Other versions of this recipe
recipeVariants.hint: Try a similar recipe in the same category at a different complexity.

quickWeek.label: Quick Week
quickWeek.description: Short cook times for breakfast + lunch + dinner

form.footerSubtitle: New recipes + cooking notes, one email a week, unsubscribe anytime.
form.inlineHeading: Weekly picks, straight to your inbox
form.inlineSubtitle: One email a week from Tarifle editors: 5-6 handpicked recipes + a short cooking tip. No ads, no spam.
form.inlineExample2: Editor's note: three simple ways to use thyme-infused oil
form.inlineExample3: Regional tour: Black Sea cabbage and anchovy classics
form.error: Something went wrong, please try again.
form.privacyHint: We use your email only to send the weekly newsletter. Every message has a one-click unsubscribe link.

confirmed.title: Subscription confirmed
confirmed.description: Your Tarifle newsletter subscription is active.
confirmed.heading: Subscription confirmed
confirmed.body: Thanks, the weekly editor's pick is now on its way. Expect the first email in a few days.

unsubscribed.title: Unsubscribed
unsubscribed.heading: You're unsubscribed
unsubscribed.body: We won't send any more weekly emails. If you ever want to come back, the footer form is always open.

expired.title: Link expired
expired.description: The confirmation link is no longer valid.
expired.heading: The confirmation link has expired
expired.body: The link was valid for 24 hours and no longer works. Subscribe again via the footer form and we'll send a fresh confirmation email.

blog.subtitle: Kitchen guides, cooking techniques and ingredient deep-dives, long-form writing from Tarifle editors.
blog.emptyBody: Our first articles will land here soon.
blog.emptyFilteredBody: Try a different search or clear all filters.

cookieBanner.message: Tarifle only uses the cookies needed to keep the site working. No advertising, tracking, or profiling cookies.

legalHub.subtitle: Transparent answers about how Tarifle works, written in plain language without the legalese. Pick a topic below.

kvkk.title: KVKK Privacy Notice
kvkk.description: What data we process, why, and under which legal basis (Turkish Data Protection Law, 6698).

kullanim.title: Terms of Use
kullanim.description: Membership, user content, allergen info and the limits of our liability.

gizlilik.title: Privacy Policy
gizlilik.description: Which infrastructure partners we rely on, how long we keep data, when deletion really ends.

cerez.title: Cookie Policy
cerez.description: Only the essential cookies. No ads, no tracking, no profiling; we explain why.

guvenlik.title: Security
guvenlik.description: What you can do to keep your account safe, and the protections we put in place.

iletisim.title: Contact Privacy Notice
iletisim.description: When you reach us by email, which data is processed and how long it is kept.

legalSecurity.subtitle: Keeping your account safe is a shared effort. When you adopt a few simple habits and we put the right protections in place, the chance of anything going wrong stays very low.
legalSecurity.accountStrongPassword: Choose a strong password used only for Tarifle. Make it at least 10 characters with a mix of upper case, lower case, numbers, and symbols. Do not reuse a password from another site.
legalSecurity.accountEmailVerify: Click the verification link we send after sign-up. Unverified accounts cannot post reviews or share adaptations.
legalSecurity.accountLogout: On a shared computer, always use "Log out" when you finish. Do not leave the session open.
legalSecurity.accountNoShare: Your username and password are yours alone. Do not share them with anyone, including the Tarifle team. We will never ask for your password.
legalSecurity.deviceDevice: Keep the operating system and browser on the device you use to access Tarifle up to date.
legalSecurity.devicePhishing: Be cautious with suspicious emails such as "your account is suspended, click here". Real Tarifle messages come from @tarifle.app or our mail provider. If unsure, contact us directly.
legalSecurity.deviceAntivirus: Do not install browser extensions from unknown sources. They can sometimes access session data.
legalSecurity.httpsBody: All traffic to and from tarifle.app travels over an encrypted channel. If you arrive on an unencrypted address, your browser is redirected to the secure one automatically, so nobody on the network can eavesdrop on what you do.
legalSecurity.passwordHashHeading: Passwords stored in an irreversible form
legalSecurity.passwordHashBody: Your password is never stored in plain text. It is transformed with an industry-standard one-way process. Even if a database snapshot somehow leaked, nobody could turn it back into the original password. That is why a forgotten password leads to a reset link instead of revealing the old one.
legalSecurity.emailVerifyBody: Verification is required on every new account. If you forget your password, we send a single-use reset link that expires after one hour. Once used or expired, the link becomes invalid.
legalSecurity.rateLimitBody: Many failed logins in a row, repeated password reset attempts, or spammy review submissions are slowed down and, if needed, blocked automatically. This protects your account from automated attacks.
legalSecurity.moderationBody: Reviews and adaptations pass through an automatic check before going live. Posts containing spam, abuse, or link bombardment go into a moderation queue and are never shown without administrator approval.
legalSecurity.infraBody: The site runs on trusted providers (Cloudflare, Vercel, Neon). Database connections, bot protection, and error tracking work together. Our error tracker automatically filters out personal information like emails and IP addresses, so no identifying data ends up in the logs.
legalSecurity.backupBody: The database is backed up automatically. We can roll back to any point within the last 7 days, which means an unexpected loss is recoverable. Development and production are kept separate; nothing from testing ever touches the live site.
legalSecurity.reportBody: If you notice a security issue, email koz.devs@gmail.com with the subject "Security". We reply within 48 hours. We appreciate researchers who help; please give us a chance to fix the issue before publishing it.

legalContactNotice.subtitle: When you email us at koz.devs@gmail.com, we process your data only for responding to you and only within the scope of your message. Details below.
legalContactNotice.kapsamBody: This notice applies to anyone, visitor or member, who reaches us through email, outside the Tarifle membership flow. General platform data processing is covered by the KVKK Privacy Notice as a separate document.
legalContactNotice.dataName: Your name / sender name you provide
legalContactNotice.dataEmail: Your email address (Gmail returns it automatically)
legalContactNotice.dataMessage: The content of your message (whatever you write, may contain personal data)
legalContactNotice.purposeResponse: Understanding and replying to your request (KVKK Art. 5/2-f, legitimate interest: mutual communication).
legalContactNotice.purposeLegal: Responding if a legal request or complaint arises (KVKK Art. 5/2-ç, legal obligation).
legalContactNotice.purposeSpam: Detecting spam and malicious requests (KVKK Art. 5/2-f, legitimate interest).
legalContactNotice.retentionBody: Email threads stay in the Gmail account while actively being tracked. After resolution, we keep them for up to 1 year for reference and then delete. If a legal process is triggered, retention follows the mandatory statutory period.
legalContactNotice.transferBody: Your messages are read only by Tarifle's administrator. They are not shared with third parties, apart from Google Mail infrastructure (Gmail servers in EU/US). Our outbound mail provider Resend (EU) only handles mail we SEND out; incoming mail lands directly in Gmail.
legalContactNotice.rightsBody: You can request deletion, correction or a copy of the email you sent. The process is covered in KVKK Privacy Notice, Section 7, send an email with the subject line "KVKK Veri Talebi" to the same address.

legalCookies.subtitle: Tarifle uses cookies only to keep the site working and remember your preferences. We do not use advertising, tracking, or profiling cookies.
legalCookies.introBody: A cookie is a small text file a website leaves in your browser. It is commonly used to remember that you are signed in, keep your language and theme preference, and perform some security checks.
legalCookies.essentialBody: These are required for the site to work and cannot be turned off. There are four of them:
legalCookies.essentialSessionDesc: Remembers that you are signed in; cleared when you log out.
legalCookies.essentialFormDesc: Prevents misuse of form submissions like reviews or password changes.
legalCookies.essentialLocaleDesc: Keeps your choice between Turkish and English. Valid for a year.
legalCookies.essentialThemeDesc: Remembers whether you prefer light or dark mode. Valid for a year.
legalCookies.functionalBody: Small preferences such as age confirmation for alcoholic drink recipes or announcements you dismissed are kept locally in your browser (device-specific, not shared). They never leave your device.
legalCookies.noTrackingBody: We do not use Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, or similar advertising and tracking tools. We do not follow your behaviour, and we do not fingerprint you. This is not an oversight; it is a deliberate choice. A recipe platform does not need these tools, and you do not deserve to become an advertising target simply for reading recipes. Even our error-tracking tool does not place a cookie in your browser.
legalCookies.controlBrowser: You can delete or block all cookies from your browser settings. In Chrome, Firefox, Safari, and Edge the path is usually similar: Settings, Privacy, Cookies.
legalCookies.controlDelete: When you choose "Delete account", the session cookie is cancelled instantly. Your account, adaptations, and reviews are permanently removed within 90 days.
legalCookies.controlImpact: If you block essential cookies entirely, you cannot sign in. Features that rely on an account, like saving favourites or posting a recipe, will not work.
legalCookies.updateBody: When we update this page, the "Last update" date at the top refreshes. If we make a significant change, we send a notice to your registered email address.

categoriesLanding.subtitle: All recipe categories on one page, jump straight to the cuisine type you're after.

discover.subtitle: Find new flavors, get inspired.
discover.sectionPersonalizedSubtitle: Built from your chosen cuisines, tags, and allergen avoidances.

discover.aiCtaSubtitle: List your ingredients and we'll find the best-matching recipes →

aiAssistant.pageTitle: Find a recipe from what you have
aiAssistant.pageSubtitle: List the ingredients in your pantry and we'll bring you the best-matching recipes. You'll also see what's missing, so you know what you can cook without going to the store.

form.personalizedHint: Cuisine and diet pre-filled from your preferences, change as you like.

timeHint.afternoonSnack: Afternoon snack, we can suggest lighter bites.
timeHint.dinnerQuick: Dinner time, want a weeknight-quick recipe?
timeHint.dinnerWeekendLong: Weekend evening, longer guest-ready recipes sit well tonight.
timeHint.lateNightSweet: Late hour, want a quick snack or dessert?

pantry.subtitle: Add what you have at home; AI Assistant and the Weekly Menu Planner will pull from this list with one click. Add expiry dates to surface urgent items first.

pantry.emptyBody: Your pantry is empty. Add ingredients above, the AI Assistant can pull this list with one click.

shoppingList.headerSubtitle: Add via the Add to list button on recipe pages, manage here.
shoppingList.empty: List is empty. Open a recipe and add ingredients.
shoppingList.moveToPantryTitle: Removes the checked items from the shopping list and adds them to your pantry. Matching names are merged with existing quantities.

save.shoppingTitleAttr: {count} ingredients will be added to your shopping list
save.collectionsEmpty: You don't have any collections yet.

toast.shoppingAlreadyAll: All ingredients are already on the list.

toast.nameTooShort: Name must be at least 2 characters.

install.title: Add Tarifle to your home screen
install.nativeBody: Install it like an app, launches faster and works offline.
install.iosBody: Tap the Share button, scroll down, and choose "Add to Home Screen".

deleteVariation.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete the "{title}" adaptation? This cannot be undone.

variations.loginCta: Sign in to add an adaptation
variations.successPending: Your adaptation has been received and will be reviewed by our team. Once approved, it will be added to the recipe and you'll be notified.

recipe.aiCrossLink: What else can I make with these ingredients?
recipe.allergenDisclaimer: Allergens are derived automatically from the ingredient list, covering the main groups of the EU-14 food allergen standard (gluten, milk, eggs, peanuts, tree nuts, soy, seafood, sesame, celery, mustard). Cross-contamination (shared kitchen equipment, shared surfaces) isn't tracked, if you have a serious allergy, review the full ingredient list yourself and ask about preparation.
recipe.variationsEmpty: No adaptations yet. Be the first to add one!
recipe.tagTooltipVegetarian: Vegetarian, no meat, poultry or fish

nutrition.title: Nutrition (per serving)
nutrition.approximateNote: Approximate values, derived from ingredient amounts using USDA FoodData Central and TÜBİTAK Turkish Food Composition Database. Actual values can vary by roughly ±20% depending on cooking method, brand, and portion size. For diet or medical conditions, consult a dietitian or doctor.

hungerBar.title: Satiety (per serving)
hungerBar.bucketLow: Light satiety, you'll get hungry again soon
hungerBar.bucketHigh: Strong satiety, counts as a main meal
hungerBar.bucketMax: Very filling, for a really hungry day

empty.title: No recipes found
empty.filtersMessage: No recipes match the selected filters.
empty.categoryMessage: Recipes will be added to this category soon.
